rules.description: Same settings for all tiers (rectangle) → mirror tier-1 onto tiers 2/3
Same settings for all tiers (AoR) → mirror the first rectangle section (tier-2) onto tier-3
Rectangle / oval / angle-top default every tier tilt rod to Center
Arch / AoR default every tier tilt rod to None (no visible rod)
Oval / angle-top / standalone arch are single-tier units
Full height: one louvered tier, no cafe
Cafe: single louvered tier + cafe rail (partial-height lower shutter)
Tier on tier: two independently-operable louvered tiers
Combination: louvered top tier over a solid bottom tier
Only arch-over-rectangle has a rectangle-body leg; zero it elsewhere
Entering arch-over-rectangle restores the default rectangle-body height
One-piece arch restores the radial sunburst fill (reverts the Two-piece → horizontal force)
Full arch → tall (≈ semicircle) rise
Eyebrow → shallow rise
T-post only exists on rectangle / arch-over-rectangle (E4)
Single-panel tier → pin Same-fill ON
Single-panel tier → pin Same-fill ON
Single-panel tier → pin Same-fill ON
Closed bypass → numeric lane spacing + 2 tracks
Open-louver bypass → auto (open-clear) lane spacing
Triple track → 3 lanes + auto (open-clear) spacing
Closed bypass → numeric lane spacing + 2 tracks
Open-louver bypass → auto (open-clear) lane spacing
Triple track → 3 lanes + auto (open-clear) spacing
Closed bypass → numeric lane spacing + 2 tracks
Open-louver bypass → auto (open-clear) lane spacing
Triple track → 3 lanes + auto (open-clear) spacing
Cafe is rectangle + single-tier only (F1)
Choosing a real frame family seats it inside (StepStyle onChange)
Direct / hang-strip mounts have no outer frame (C2f)
No outer frame + inside mount ⇒ direct mount (C3f)
Hang-strip mount uses the hang-strip profile (C5f)
No-bottom frame ⇒ no sill (C6f)
No sill ⇒ no cap treatment (C7f)
Round/irregular ⇒ four-sides, no sill, no cap (C8f)
Pure arch ⇒ four-sides frame (C9f)
Oval preset "vertical-oval" stamps its extent triple
Oval preset "horizontal-oval" stamps its extent triple
Oval preset "circle" stamps its extent triple

variations.label: Tiers
variations.description: Rectangle sections below the arch crown
